ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., 8"x8") */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., Knurled Knob/ Key Operated Latch Bolt) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
column_names: Style of the product (e.g., Knurled Knob/ Key Operated Latch Bolt)
Weight of the product for shipping
Quantity of the product in stock
Timestamp when the product was added
Timestamp when the product was last updated

Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered)
